decision: Confirmation passed: the packaged default filter_skymodel_ncores=15 matches the explicit filter-only-15 profile within CI variance. Treat the current image-sector split as the stable baseline for the next scalability slice.

baseline-2x30.shape: 2 workers x 30 threads, max_threads=30, filter_skymodel_ncores=15 by default

filter-only-15.shape: 2 workers x 30 threads, max_threads=30, filter_skymodel_ncores=15 explicitly

next_step: Split calculate_image_diagnostics into its own image-sector task, add focused task-boundary tests, then rerun focused image tests and the CI-sized benchmark.
